name: Snapleaf
description:
Activate (Reaction) Interact

Trigger You begin to fall

This small, crystalline carving takes the shape of a tree leaf and attaches to armor or clothing with a simple strap.

When you activate the snapleaf, you gain the benefits of Gentle Landing and a 2nd-rank Invisibility spell for 1 minute or until you stop falling, whichever comes first.
